prompt: Create a piano stab pattern — short staccato chords on the off-beats.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

ch 7 Piano
  plugin piano

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

  ch 7 Piano
    p _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x
    n 60 64 67

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

  ch 7 Piano
    p _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x _x x
    n 65 69 72

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly used 16th-note rests and notes to create a syncopated, short-chord stab pattern.
judgment.quality_reason: The pattern is musically functional and syncopated, though playing on every 'e' and 'a' (8 times a bar) is a bit denser than typical 8th-note off-beat stabs.
